author: mokeyish
description: Enhanced export based on Pandoc. Allows export to formats like HTML, DOCX, ePub and PDF or Hugo.

manifest.author: YISH
manifest.description: This is a enhancing export plugin for Obsidian. It allows to export to formats like Html, DOCX, ePub and PDF or Markdown(Hugo) etc.
manifest.name: Enhancing Export

name: Enhancing Export

* ⬆️ Bump obsidian from 1.5.7-1 to 1.6.6 by @dependabot in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export/pull/218
* ⬆️ Bump solid-js from 1.8.18 to 1.8.20 by @dependabot in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export/pull/228

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export/compare/1.10.7...1.10.8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* :bug: Fix pandocbounded error by @universvm in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export/pull/213
* ⬆️ Bump @types/yargs-parser from 21.0.0 to 21.0.3 by @dependabot in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export/pull/187
* ⬆️ Bump tslib from 2.3.1 to 2.6.3 by @dependabot in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export/pull/196
* ⬆️ Bump @types/node from 16.18.99 to 20.14.8 by @dependabot in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export/pull/198
* ⬆️ Bump solid-js from 1.8.17 to 1.8.18 by @dependabot in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export/pull/202
* ⬆️ Bump prettier from 2.8.8 to 3.3.3 by @dependabot in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export/pull/210


## New Contributors
* @dependabot made their first contribution in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export/pull/187

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export/compare/1.10.6...1.10.7

releases.description:
## What's Changed
-  Support for referencing variables from front-matter
    You can use keyword: value in [YAML Front Matter](https://jekyllrb.com/docs/front-matter/), then use `${metadata.keyword}`


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export/compare/1.5.4...1.6.1
